scripts.verify: turbo run lint typecheck test build
scripts.db:auth: node --env-file=.env.local scripts/apply-sql-migration.mjs apps/dashboard/drizzle/0000_auth_bootstrap.sql && node --env-file=.env.local scripts/apply-sql-migration.mjs apps/dashboard/drizzle/0001_organization_plan.sql && node --env-file=.env.local scripts/apply-sql-migration.mjs apps/api/drizzle/0001_api_agent_tables.sql && node --env-file=.env.local scripts/apply-sql-migration.mjs apps/api/drizzle/0002_agent_capability_grant_unique.sql && node --env-file=.env.local scripts/apply-sql-migration.mjs apps/admin/drizzle/0000_admin_columns.sql
scripts.db:setup: pnpm db:migrate && pnpm db:auth && pnpm db:seed-auth
